content_body: We are so blessed to be able to stay at such a beautiful cabin in Blue Ridge! We visited Blue Ridge for our 10th anniversary and have fallen in love with this beautiful place. We have a cabin back home in Michigan and your lovely home has given us so many ideas! Being here for this short time has made us decide to buy a home here in a few years. So very sad to have to leave as I could stay here forever. Thank you so much for sharing your little piece of heaven with us!
title: Fell in Love with Blue Ridge GA
